specializations: VitaGuard® A solid lipid encapsulation (launched January 2025)
product_highlights: VitaGuard® A - Revolutionary solid lipid encapsulation for Vitamin A (launched Jan 2025)
Enhanced retinol stability and controlled skin release
Reduced irritation potential vs. unencapsulated retinol
Broad encapsulation portfolio for multiple active types
notes: Global chemical giant with significant cosmetic delivery system capabilities. VitaGuard® A (launched January 2025) is a breakthrough solid lipid encapsulation technology for Vitamin A that dramatically improves retinol stability and reduces irritation. BASF's scale and R&D resources make them a critical supplier for any formulation requiring active ingredient protection and controlled release.
